template.name: News Player
template.t:
<!DOCTYPE html>
                
                    

                        
                        
                        Global RSS News Aggregator
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                            tailwind.config = {
                                theme: {
                                    extend: {
                                        colors: {
                                            'primary-blue': '#1e40af',
                                            'accent-orange': '#f59e0b',
                                        },
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                            startCommonAppsAI();
                        
                        
                        

                            

                                

                                    

                                        Go to Pi Browser
                                    
                                    

                                        Click here
                                    
                                
                                

                                    

                                        Donate to unlock Apps
                                    
                                    

                                        Click here
                                    
                                    

                                        

                                        Or here to test this app
                                    
                                
                                

                                    Loading...
                                
                            
                        
                        
                        
                        
You need to access from Pi Browser.
                    
                    

                        

                                
                            
                                

                                    
                                    
                                        $( document ).ready(function() {
                                            $("#translate_text_latinchain_2").appendTo(".translate_here");
                                            $("#google_translate_element").appendTo(".translate_here");
                                            
                                            $("#translate_text_latinchain_2").show();
                                            $("#google_translate_element").show();
                                        });
                                    
                                    
                                
                            
                                

                                
                                
                                

                                    

                                        

                                            
                                        
                                    
                                    
                                    

                                    
                                    Global News RSS
                                
                                
Headline aggregator from the world's leading sources.
                            

                            
                            

                                
                                
                                
                                

                                    

                                    
Loading feeds. This may take a moment...
                                    

                                        Note: A public proxy service is used to avoid CORS issues.
